exmls.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.AdLoadingGroupSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing">
	<e:Image left="-100" right="-100" top="0" bottom="0" source="bg_snap_msg" scale9Grid="42,2,5,18" />
	<e:Group horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0">
		<e:Label id="loadingMsg" text="资料下载中" verticalCenter="0" size="26" y="-14" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" right="26"/>
		<e:Group verticalCenter="0" right="0" width="35">
			<e:Label id="loadingAnim" text="..." verticalCenter="0" size="26" y="-14" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="0"/>
		</e:Group>
		<e:layout>
			<e:HorizontalLayout gap="0"/>
		</e:layout>
	</e:Group>
	<e:Rect id="progressBar" width="0" height="2" fillColor="0xffffff" verticalCenter="19" left="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.ExtraGameListSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" width="480">
    <e:List id="gameList" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="12" right="12" top="30" bottom="0">
        <e:layout>
            <e:VerticalLayout gap="10" paddingTop="22" paddingBottom="12"/>
        </e:layout>
    </e:List>
	<e:Label id="collapseIcon" text="▼" size="23" right="14" scaleY="0.85" top="7" textColor="0xffffff"/>
	<e:Group id="titleGrp" left="14" top="12" right="2">
		<e:Label id="title" text="" size="18" verticalAlign="middle" textColor="0xf0b942" bold="true" left="0" height="18"/>
		<e:layout>
		<e:HorizontalLayout paddingLeft="0"/>
		</e:layout>
	</e:Group>
	<e:Label id="subTitle" text="" size="14" verticalAlign="middle" bold="false" horizontalCenter="12" textColor="0xffffff" anchorOffsetY="0" wordWrap="true" multiline="true" width="301" top="13"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.GameIconJpSkin" width="130" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" height="40">
    <e:Image anchorOffsetX="0" width="130" horizontalCenter="0" source="yoplayplazacommon_json.game_icon_jpbg" height="28" scale9Grid="12,10,9,8" anchorOffsetY="0" bottom="0"/>
	<Locale:LocaleLabel id="jpLbl" text="8,888,888.88" y="18.5" textColor="0xff0000" width="111" textAlign="center" size="15" anchorOffsetX="0" localeKey="yoplayplaza.jackpot" bold="true" horizontalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.NewScrollerAdViewerSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" minWidth="480" maxWidth="480" height="109" width="480">
	<e:Rect left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0"  visible="false"/>
	<e:Scroller left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" id="uiScroller" scrollPolicyV="off">
		<e:List id="list">
			<e:itemRendererSkinName>
				<e:Skin xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" width="480" height="125">
					<e:Image source="{data.game.icon}" left="0" top="0" right="0" bottom="0"/>
				</e:Skin>
			</e:itemRendererSkinName>
			<e:layout>
				<e:HorizontalLayout/>
			</e:layout>            			
		</e:List>
	</e:Scroller>
	<e:Group bottom="2" height="12" right="5">
		<e:Rect top="0" left="0" bottom="0" right="0" fillColor="0x000000" fillAlpha="0.5" ellipseWidth="12" ellipseHeight="12"/>
		<e:List id="pagination" height="100%">
			<e:itemRendererSkinName>
				<e:Skin states="up,upAndSelected,downAndSelected,down">
					<e:Rect width="17" width.up="10" height="10" verticalCenter="0" left="0" right="0" fillColor.up="0x333333" fillAlpha.up="0.25" fillAlpha="1" fillColor="0xEEB769" strokeWeight="2" strokeColor="0xEEB769" strokeColor.up="0x666666" ellipseWidth="10" ellipseHeight="10"/>
				</e:Skin>
			</e:itemRendererSkinName>
			<e:layout>
				<e:HorizontalLayout verticalAlign="middle" gap="16" horizontalAlign="center" paddingLeft="6" paddingRight="6"/>
			</e:layout>
		</e:List>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.NewYoPlayPlazaBannerGallerySkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui"  xmlns:YP="YPUi.*" width="480" height="109">
	<e:Group id="gallery" left="0" right="0" top="0" height="109" x="0" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1">
		<e:Rect scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0"/>
	</e:Group>
	<e:Group id="bannerFgHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" height="109" x="0" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" touchThrough="true"/>
	<YP:AdLoadingGroup id="adLoadingGroup" skinName="YoPlayPlazaSkins.AdLoadingGroupSkin" height="50" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0" visible="false"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.NewYoPlayPlazaGameCategoryItemRendererSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:tween="egret.tween.*" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" states="up,upAndSelected,disabled" >
	<w:Declarations>
	</w:Declarations>
	<!--<e:Rect left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillAlpha="1" fillColor.upAndSelected="0xa40a22" strokeColor.upAndSelected="0xf02b47" strokeWeight.upAndSelected="2" fillColor="0x1b033f" includeIn="up"/>-->
	<e:Image id="btnBg" source="btn_types_on" verticalCenter="0" source.up="btn_types_off" source.disabled="btn_types_off" left="0" right="0" scale9Grid="14,14,61,3"/>
	<e:Group verticalCenter="0" horizontalCenter="-1">
		<e:Image id="typeIcon" verticalCenter="0" source="btn_icon_all"/>
		<Locale:LocaleLabel id="title" text="全部" left="30" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" size="18" textAlign="center" verticalAlign="bottom" wordWrap="true"/>
		<e:layout>
			<e:HorizontalLayout verticalAlign="middle" gap="0" verticalAlign.upAndSelected="middle"/>
		</e:layout>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.NewYoPlayPlazaGameIconJackpotSkin" width="145" height="30" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*">
	<e:Image scale9Grid="14,13,10,8" source="yoplayplazacommon_json.bg_jackpot" verticalCenter="-2.5" horizontalCenter="0"/>
	<Locale:LocaleLabel id="jpLbl" text="99,999,999.99" left="0" right="0" top="8" bottom="-8" textAlign="center" textColor="0xff0000" size="18" verticalAlign="middle" localeKey="yoplayplaza.jackpot"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.NewYoPlayPlazaGameItemRenderer" width="145" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" states="normal,new,hot,newandhot,maintenance" >
		<e:Group id="iconGrp" width="145" height="123" x="0" anchorOffsetY="0" bottom="0">
			<e:Image id="iconBg" source="yoplayplazacommon_json.bg_frame_multi" x="-6" top="-6"/>
			<e:Group height="98.66" left="0" right="0" top="0" anchorOffsetY="0">
				<e:Rect id="imgGrpMask" left="2" right="2" top="2" ellipseHeight="20" ellipseWidth="20" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" bottom="2" fillColor="0xfbcf00"/>
				<e:Group id="imgGrp" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
					<e:Image id="gameIcon" verticalCenter="0" horizontalCenter="0"/>
					<e:Group id="starMcGrp" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0" touchThrough="true" touchEnabled="false"/>
					<e:Group id="headCountGrp" width="85" height="16" right="0" bottom="0" x="60" y="104" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" visible.maintenance="false">
						<e:Image source="yoplayplazacommon_json.bg_qty_player" right="0" bottom="1" scale9Grid="11,1,69,13" height="16"/>
						<e:Group x="0" y="0" anchorOffsetX="0" width="79">
							<e:Image source="yoplayplazacommon_json.icon_qty_player" x="67" y="0"/>
							<e:Label id="headCountLbl" text="8888" textAlign="right" verticalAlign="bottom" size="12" anchorOffsetX="0" x="40" y="0"/>
							<e:layout>
								<e:HorizontalLayout horizontalAlign="right" verticalAlign="middle" gap="2"/>
							</e:layout>
						</e:Group>
					</e:Group>
					<e:Group id="mpGrp" height="16" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="0" top="0">
						<e:Image id="mpBg" scale9Grid="1,1,5,14" anchorOffsetX="0" left="0" top="1" bottom="0" source="msc_multiplayer_label" right="-13"/>
						<Locale:LocaleLabel id="mpLbl" text="多人版" textAlign="left" verticalAlign="bottom" size="11" localeKey="yoplayplaza.mp_version" top="2" bottom="1" x="5"/>
					</e:Group>
					<e:Group id="maintenanceGrp" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" visible.normal="false" visible.new="false" visible.hot="false" visible.newandhot="false">
						<e:Image horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0" source="yoplayplazacommon_json.msc_icon_maintenance"/>
						<Locale:LocaleLabel text="维护中" localeKey="yoplayplaza.maintenance" bottom="8.66" textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle" size="19" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" anchorOffsetX="0" border="false" stroke="2" strokeColor="0x000000" horizontalCenter="1" textColor="0xff0000"/>
					</e:Group>
				</e:Group>
				<e:Image id="outlineGrpMask" source="yoplayplazacommon_json.btn_gameicon_mask" y="0" left="0" right="1"/>
				<e:Group id="outlineGrp" height="98.67" y="0" visible.normal="false" visible.maintenance="false" anchorOffsetY="0" left="0" right="0">
					<e:Rect id="outline" left="0" right="0" top="0" fillColor="0xFBCF00" ellipseHeight="16" ellipseWidth="16" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" bottom="0.67" strokeWeight="3" fillAlpha="0" x="0" y="0" strokeColor="0xfbcf00" anchorOffsetY="0"/>
					<e:Group id="outlineFxHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0.67" anchorOffsetY="0">
					<e:Image id="outlineFx" source="yoplayplazacommon_json.vfx_lighting" x="-92" y="-4.5" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" anchorOffsetX="0" width="90"/>
					</e:Group>
				</e:Group>
			</e:Group>
			<e:Group id="textGrp" bottom="2.67" height="25" left="0" right="0">
				<e:Image source="yoplayplazacommon_json.bg_game_name_blue" source.hot="yoplayplazacommon_json.bg_game_name_org" right="-1" left="-1"/>
				<e:Group id="newGrp" width="42.75" height="16" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" top="-96" y="10" anchorOffsetX="0" right="0" visible.normal="false" visible.hot="false" visible.maintenance="false">
					<Locale:LocaleImage localeName="msc_icon_new" x="27.25" y="-11.3" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
				</e:Group>
				<e:Group id="hotGrp" width="35" height="25" visible.normal="false" visible.new="false" visible.maintenance="false" right="-21" top="-92">
					<Locale:LocaleImage x="-12.5" y="-19" includeInLayout="false" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" localeName="msc_icon_hot"/>
					<e:Group id="hotMcHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
					</e:Group>
				</e:Group>
				<Locale:LocaleLabel id="gameName" text="彩金水果拉霸" top="2" bottom="0" textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle" size="14" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" width="144.33" width.normal="145" x.normal="0" x.new="0" width.new="145" x.maintenance="0" width.maintenance="145" anchorOffsetX="0" border="false" stroke="2" strokeColor="0x09287c" horizontalCenter="0" autoFit="true"/>
			</e:Group>
			<e:Group id="vipPriorityGroup" height="119" left="0" right="0" top="0" x="10" y="10" visible="false">
				<e:Image source="yoplayplazacommon_json.vip_first" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="-14.5"/>
				<e:Label id="vipPriorityTxt" horizontalCenter="1" text="正式開放:10月25日13时" textColor="0xF72727" size="13" y="66.99" rotation="352.69"/>
			</e:Group>
			<e:Group id="profitGrp" top="1" right="0" height="24" visible="false">
				<e:Image source="msc_profit_bar" top="0" bottom="0" left="0" right="0"/>
				<e:Group verticalCenter="0" horizontalCenter="0" height="20">
					<e:Image source="msc_profit_star" />
					<Locale:LocaleLabel text=" 最高盈利：" localeKey="yoplayplaza.highest_won" size="15" textColor="0xfdfb55" height="20" verticalAlign="middle"/>
					<e:Label id="profitLbl" text="0" size="15" textColor="0xfdfb55" height="20" verticalAlign="middle"/>
					<e:layout>
						<e:HorizontalLayout verticalAlign="middle" gap="0" horizontalAlign="center" paddingLeft="5" paddingRight="5"/>
					</e:layout>
				</e:Group>
			</e:Group>
			<e:Group id="questHotGrpHolder" x="0" touchEnabled="false" height="37" bottom="27" y="54" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" width="143"/>
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group id="jpGrp" width="145" bottom="123" horizontalCenter="0"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.YoPlayPlazaBottomGallerySkin" width="480" height="76" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui">
    <e:Group id="contentGrp" bottom="0" horizontalCenter="0" touchEnabled="false" touchChildren="false">
    </e:Group>

    <e:Group id="btnGrp" x="213" bottom="3" touchEnabled="false" touchChildren="false">
        <e:Image id="btnImg"/>
    </e:Group>

    <e:Group id="lightGrp" bottom="0" width="100%" touchEnabled="false" touchChildren="false">
        <e:Image id="lightMask" bottom="0" horizontalCenter="0"/>
        <e:Image id="lightImg" source="vfx_lighting" mask="{lightMask}" bottom="0" width="161" x="-161"/>
    </e:Group>

    <e:Group width="100%" height="100%"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.NewYoPlayPlazaPageSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:ns1="*" xmlns:HomePlaza="HomePlaza.*" xmlns:Common="Common.*" xmlns:YP="YPUi.*" xmlns:YoPlayPlaza="YoPlayPlaza.*" minHeight="715" minWidth="480" width="480" height="715">
	<e:Image top="0" left="0" right="0" source="bg_header"/>
	<e:Image id="bgImg" source="bg_gamelist" left="0" right="0" top="66" anchorOffsetY="0" height="649"/>
	<e:Group id="bgFxHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" touchChildren="false" touchEnabled="false"/>
	<e:Group id="rewardPointTipGrp" height="15" width="200" anchorOffsetY="0" anchorOffsetX="0" top="2" right="10" visible="false">
		<e:Rect right="0" left="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillAlpha="0.7" ellipseHeight="10" ellipseWidth="10" fillColor="0x111111"/>
		<Locale:LocaleLabel localeKey="common.reward_points_tips" size="13" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0"/>
	</e:Group>
	<!--<e:Group id="longNoticeGroup" height="15" left="0" right="0" top="0">
		<e:Rect left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillColor="0xa4011b"/>
		<e:Label id="longNoticeLabel" text="long notice" size="13" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" textAlign="center"/>
	</e:Group>-->
	<e:Group id="totalHeadCountGrp" top="20" touchChildren="false" touchEnabled="false" touchThrough="true" right="60">
		<e:Rect top="0" left="0" bottom="0" right="0" fillColor="0x000000" fillAlpha="0.5" ellipseHeight="16" ellipseWidth="16"/>
		<e:Group height="15">
			<e:Image source="icon_qty_player" x="35" y="7"/>
			<e:Label id="totalPlayerLbl" text="2345" size="13" verticalAlign="middle"/>
			<e:layout>
				<e:HorizontalLayout verticalAlign="middle" gap="3" paddingLeft="5" paddingRight="5"/>
			</e:layout>
		</e:Group>
	</e:Group>
	<YP:PlazaUserProfile id="userProfile" x="9" y="14"/>

	<e:Group id="platformEventToastHolder" right="57" top="0" height="67">
	</e:Group>

	<e:Group top="66">
		<e:Group id="galleryFxHolder" left="0" right="0"/>
	<e:Scroller id="gameScroller" anchorOffsetY="0" x="0" top="0" bounces="false">
		<e:Group>
			<e:Group id="galleryScrollHolder" width="100%" />
			<e:Group width="100%">
				<e:Rect  left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillAlpha="0.6"/>
				<e:Group id="extraGameListGrp" left="0" anchorOffsetX="0" right="0">
					<e:layout>
						<e:VerticalLayout paddingBottom="0" paddingTop="0" paddingLeft="0" paddingRight="0" gap="0"/>
					</e:layout>
				</e:Group>
			</e:Group>
			<e:Group anchorOffsetY="0">
				<e:Group id="subGameList" width="480" top="44" minHeight="605">
					<e:List id="gameList" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="12" right="12" top="0">
						<e:layout>
							<e:VerticalLayout gap="10" paddingTop="12" paddingBottom="12"/>
						</e:layout>
					</e:List>
				</e:Group>
				<e:Group id="categoryGrp" height="44" left="0" right="0" y="0">
					<e:Image id="categoryBgMask" left="0" right="0" top="2" bottom="0" source="bg_gamelist" fillMode="clip" visible="false"/>
					<e:Image id="bgImg2" source="bg_gamelist" left="0" right="0" top="0" anchorOffsetY="0" height="649" mask="{categoryBgMask}" visible="false"/>
					<!--<e:Rect id="categoryEventBgMask" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillColor="0x167bf2" visible="false"/>-->
					<e:Image top="0" left="0" right="0" source="msc_banner_light" height="2"/>
					<e:Scroller anchorOffsetY="0" x="3" top="2" bounces="false">
					<e:Group anchorOffsetY="0" width="480">
					<e:List id="categoryList" height="41" top="2" x="0">
					<e:layout>
						<e:HorizontalLayout gap="4"/>
					</e:layout>
					</e:List>
					</e:Group>
					</e:Scroller>
					<e:Group id="spliterGrp" touchChildren="false" touchEnabled="false" touchThrough="true" height="41" left="0" right="0" top="2">
					<e:layout>
						<e:HorizontalLayout paddingLeft="119" verticalAlign="middle" gap="118"/>
					</e:layout>
					</e:Group>
					<e:Group id="categoryFgHolder" touchChildren="false" touchEnabled="false" height="41" left="0" right="0" top="2"/>
				</e:Group>
			</e:Group>
			<e:layout>
				<e:VerticalLayout gap="0"/>
			</e:layout>
		</e:Group>
	</e:Scroller>
		<e:layout>
			<e:VerticalLayout gap="0"/>
		</e:layout>
	</e:Group>
	<e:Group id="fgFxHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" touchChildren="false" touchEnabled="false"/>
	<e:Group id="loadingGrp" height="715" y="0" left="0" right="0" visible="false">
		<e:Rect left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillColor="0x162344" x="0" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		<e:Image id="logo" horizontalCenter="0" y="210" source="icons/yoplay_loading/load_logo.png" anchorOffsetX="0" width="282" anchorOffsetY="0" height="92.5" x="99" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		<Locale:LocaleLabel id="startInfo" text="" size="20" textAlign="center" textColor="0xFFFFFF" bottom="244" localeKey="common.loading" left="50" right="50" />
	</e:Group>
	<YoPlayPlaza:YoPlayPlazaBottomGallery id="bottomGallery" left="0" right="0" bottom="0" skinName="YoPlayPlazaSkins.YoPlayPlazaBottomGallerySkin"/>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.PlatformEventYoPlaySideMenuSkin" height="800" currentState="portrait" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" xmlns:YP="YPUi.*" minWidth="240" states="portrait,landscape"  height.landscape="480" width="247">
	<e:Rect id="touchLayer" width="480" top="0" bottom="0" right="0" fillAlpha="0" width.landscape="854"/>
	<e:Group id="mainGrp" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" width="247">
		<e:Image left="-4" right="-4" top="-4" bottom="-4" source="ema24_json.ema24_msc_menu_bg" scale9Grid="21,21,36,42"/>
		<e:Image right="0" anchorOffsetY="0" source="ema24_json.ema24_msc_menu_top" top="0"/>
    	<e:Label id="versionCode" text="Label" size="16" textAlign="center" textColor="0xffffff" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" top="3" right="4"/>
		<e:Group top="0" id="profileGroup" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" left="-6" visible="false"/>
		<YP:PlazaUserProfile id="userProfile" y="30" x="-2"/>
		<Locale:LocaleImage id="logo" horizontalCenter="5" bottom="20" maxWidth="240" fillMode="scale" maxHeight="120" x="0" y="570" scaleX="0.9" scaleY="0.9" localeName="brandlogo_lang" visible.landscape="false"/>
		
		<e:Group x="162" y="45">
			<e:Rect fillAlpha="0.8" left="-2" right="-2" top="-2" bottom="-2" ellipseWidth="5" ellipseHeight="5"/>
			<Locale:LocaleLabel id="currencyLabel" text="幣種: CNY" size="12" scaleX="1" scaleY="1"/>
		</e:Group>
		
		<e:Group id="sideMenuContentsGrp" top="171" bottom="0" left="4" right="0">
			<e:Group id="sideMenuTopHolder" left="0" right="0">
			</e:Group>
			<e:Group id="questHolder" left="0" right="0" top="190"/>
			<YP:ScrollerBase id="sideMenuBtnsScroller" maxHeight="410" scrollBarVisible="true" scrollPolicyH="off" scrollPolicyV="on" y.portrait="0" verticalCenter.portrait="20" x="0" verticalCenter.landscape="20" bounces="false">
				<e:List id="buttonList" itemRendererSkinName="YPSkins.YoPlayPlazaSideMenuItemRendererSkin">
				<e:layout>
					<e:TileLayout horizontalAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle" orientation="rows" requestedColumnCount="2" rowAlign="top" columnAlign="left" horizontalGap="0" verticalGap="0" verticalAlign.portrait="top" paddingTop="6" paddingBottom="6" paddingRight="4"/>
				</e:layout>
				</e:List>
			</YP:ScrollerBase>
			<e:layout>
				<e:VerticalLayout gap="0" horizontalAlign="justify" paddingTop="10"/>
			</e:layout>
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group id="sideMenuBottomHolder" left="0" right="0" bottom="0"/>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

					</e:Group>
					<e:Group id="maintenanceGrp" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" visible.normal="false" visible.new="false" visible.hot="false" visible.newandhot="false">
						<e:Image source="yoplayplazacommon_json.icon_maintenance" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0"/>
						<Locale:LocaleImage horizontalCenter="0" bottom="5" localeName="txt_maintenance" source=""/>

					<e:Group id="outlineFxHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">

			</e:Group>
			<e:Group id="textGrp" left="0" right="0" bottom="0" height="25">

				<e:Group id="hotGrp" width="35" height="25" y="0" visible.normal="false" visible.new="false" visible.maintenance="false">

					<e:Group id="hotMcHolder" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">

					<Locale:LocaleImage x="-5" y="-8" localeName="txt_hot"/>

				<Locale:LocaleLabel id="gameName" text="彩金水果拉霸" top="0" bottom="0" textAlign="center" verticalAlign="middle" size="16" x="35" y="0" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" width="110" width.normal="145" x.normal="0" x.new="0" width.new="145" x.maintenance="0" width.maintenance="145" autoFit="true"/>
			</e:Group>

				<e:Image source="yoplayplazacommon_json.vip_first" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="15.5"/>

		</e:layout>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.YoPlayPlazaPageSkin" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" xmlns:ns1="*" xmlns:HomePlaza="HomePlaza.*" xmlns:Common="Common.*" xmlns:YP="YPUi.*" minHeight="715" minWidth="480" width="480" height="715">

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<e:Skin class="YoPlayPlazaSkins.YoPlaySuggestionPageSkin" width="480" height="690" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:Locale="Locale.*" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<e:Rect id="themeRectBg" top="0" bottom="0" left="0" right="0" fillColor="0x193F62" fillAlpha="0.8"/>
	<e:Group id="backGroup" width="45" height="33" left="7" top="7">
		<e:Rect id="back0" fillAlpha="0.5" ellipseHeight="10" ellipseWidth="10" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0"/>
		<e:Image source="yoplaycommon_json.btn_back" verticalCenter="0" horizontalCenter="-2" touchEnabled="false"/>
	</e:Group>
	<e:Group horizontalCenter="0" top="58">
		<e:Group top="0" left="0" right="7" x="21" y="22" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" width="446">
			<Locale:LocaleLabel localeKey="common.suggestion_brief" text="Welcome to write something to us, your valuable comments or suggestions will help us to make product better." size="18" left="60" right="60" verticalAlign="bottom" textAlign="left" wordWrap="true" multiline="true" height="60" width="446"/>
			<Locale:LocaleLabel localeKey="yoplayplaza.suggestion_tips" text="小贴士：按照标签标记您的意见，可以让我们快速定位到您提交的资讯。" size="18" verticalAlign="middle" textAlign="left" textColor="0xfffc00" wordWrap="true" width="446"/>
			<Locale:LocaleLabel localeKey="yoplayplaza.suggestion_tips2" text="标签使用方式：在以下标签中点击选择您的意见标签即可，可以多选。" size="18" verticalAlign="middle" textAlign="left" textColor="0xfffc00" wordWrap="true" width="446"/>
			<e:List id="tagList" y="0" allowMultipleSelection="true" width="446" useVirtualLayout="false">
				<e:itemRendererSkinName>
					<e:Skin states="up,upAndSelected,disabled">
					<e:Group width="100%" height="100%">
						<e:Rect fillAlpha="1" strokeWeight="1" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" fillColor.up="0xffffff" fillColor.upAndSelected="0xfffc00" ellipseWidth="20" ellipseHeight="20" strokeColor="0x000000" strokeAlpha="1" width="100%"/>
						<Locale:LocaleLabel text="{data.label}" size="20" textColor="0xff0000" left="10" right="10" top="7" bottom="6" textAlign="center"/>
					</e:Group>
					</e:Skin>
				</e:itemRendererSkinName>
				<e:layout>
					<e:TileLayout />
				</e:layout>
			</e:List>
			<e:layout>
				<e:VerticalLayout />
			</e:layout>
		</e:Group>
		<e:Group x="26" y="215" width="431" height="256">
			<e:Rect fillAlpha="1" strokeWeight="2" ellipseWidth="20" fillColor="0x000000" strokeColor="0xffffff" scaleX="1" scaleY="1" anchorOffsetX="0" right="-5" left="-5" top="-5" bottom="-5"/>
			<e:EditableText id="textInput" text="" size="20" multiline="true" left="5" right="5" top="5" bottom="5" wordWrap="true"/>
		</e:Group>
		<Locale:LocaleButton localeKey="common.confirm" id="confirmButton" label="確 定" skinName="YPSkins.YoPlayPopupBoardConfirmButtonSkin" horizontalCenter="0.5" top="496"/>
		<e:layout>
			<e:VerticalLayout horizontalAlign="center" gap="14"/>
		</e:layout>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>
